items.summary: Display the uploaded UP Police logo (logo.png) prominently on the Login page header and in the app navigation bar, alongside the title 'PS Sadar Bazar Application Box - UP Police'.

Apply a consistent government/official visual theme across the entire application: deep navy and saffron/gold color scheme inspired by UP Police branding, formal typography, clear bilingual labels, and a clean table-based admin dashboard layout.

Implement Admin Login with username/ID and password authentication. Admins must be able to change/update their password. Password update must require verification via the admin's registered mobile number (OTP simulation stored in backend state, since real SMS is not available).
Implement User/Applicant Login with username/ID and password. Regular users are directed to the complaint submission form after login.

Build a bilingual (Hindi + English) complaint submission form with the following fields: Name / नाम, Father's Name / पिता का नाम, Address / पता, Mobile Number / मोबाइल नंबर, Complaint Detail / शिकायत विवरण. The form must allow attaching a PDF or JPG file or capturing a photo via the device camera.

On successful complaint submission, auto-generate a unique complaint number, store it in the backend, and display it to the applicant. Simulate sending an SMS notification to the applicant's mobile number by storing a notification record in the backend (real SMS gateway is not available).

Implement an Officer Management panel for admins to appoint officers by entering their name and mobile number. When an officer is assigned to a complaint, store the assignment in the backend and simulate an SMS notification to the officer's mobile number.

Implement complaint status management with three stages: Pending → In Progress → Resolved. Admins must be able to update the status, enter a resolution detail, and record a hearing date and time for each status transition.
Implement an attendance/hearing record section on the complaint detail page where the assigned officer's attendance details, date, and time of hearing are recorded and stored.

Generate a printable/downloadable PDF receipt for each complaint containing: complaint number, all applicant details (name, father name, address, mobile), complaint detail, current status, assigned officer details, hearing date/time, and a reference to the attached file. The receipt must be available from the complaint detail page.
